commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

to avoid musl libc native library crash, and add --no-watch-fs flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Sprint 4 — nouvelles fonctionnalités :
- Modèle Payment (Prisma) + migration add-payments
- API paiements : /api/orders/[id]/payments, /api/payments, /api/payments/[id]/receipt
- API facture PDF : /api/orders/[id]/invoice

Revue complète sprints 1-4 — corrections :
- fix(monetary): totalPaid stocké en FCFA (cohérent avec totalPrice), conversion centimes→FCFA lors agrégation
- fix(orders): auto-création Payment(ADVANCE) à la création commande si avance > 0

Fix AoO builder auto-save guard to not skip first real change

The previous approach used a ref that skipped the first effect trigger,
but if the loaded data had no builder state, the ref never got set and
the first actual user change was also skipped. Now uses a timeout after
loading completes to mark initialization done.

fix: replace Link with <a> tags in dashboard/sidebar/header

Next.js <Link> triggers RSC prefetch cascade even with prefetch={false}.
Replace navigation links in dashboard, sidebar, and header with plain

Page transitions become full-page loads (~150-240ms) which is acceptable.

commit.message:
Fix CE/CV payment detection in portal — add Concepto-text fallback

Align portal dept-detection logic with backend deptDeRow():
1. mCEfull regex now requires a digit in last segment (prevents matching
   CE-CIS → "CIS" as dept)
2. New step 3: when both col I and col G fail, extract dept number from
   col C Concepto text ("CUOTA EXTRA CISTERNAS 305" → "305")

This fixes CE-CIS (and similar) payments where col G has no dept number
and col I may be empty — previously those payments were silently lost.

commit.message:
fix FirebaseInitGuard: use @try/@catch instead of appNamed: check

The appNamed: lookup fails because the first configure stores the app
under "__FIRAPP_DEFAULT" while FLTFirebaseCorePlugin requests "[DEFAULT]",
causing the existence check to return nil and the duplicate call to proceed.
ObjC @try/@catch directly catches and suppresses the NSInternalInconsistencyException.

commit.message:
Fix E2E test flakiness (#190)

* Fix E2E test flakiness from cascade race conditions and UI timing

- Scope DELETE booking cascade to only bookings with the same promotions
  applied, matching the PUT handler's approach. A booking with no
  BookingPromotion records cannot affect subsequent bookings' priorUsage,
  so no cascade is needed. This eliminates cross-test cascade interference
  when running with parallel workers.
- Add waitForLoadState("networkidle") in the UI payment type restriction
  test after the second page.goto("/promotions") to prevent webkit from
  searching for the promotion row before the API response lands.
- Pin playwright config to retries: 1 and workers: 2 for both local and
  CI runs, and use dedicated test server on port 3001.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix: return 404 when deleting a non-existent booking

Return a proper 404 instead of letting prisma.booking.delete throw a
500 when the booking is not found. Gemini review suggestion on PR #190.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Register skill tools as MCP tools via getSkillMcpTools() so subagents can call them

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(luau): robust iter-to-for lowering and body_start scanning

Fix lower_iter_to_for body_start scanner:
- Only break on end_if AFTER seen_break_check (exception-handling end_if
  appears before the exhausted check, not after)
- Add all exception boilerplate ops to the skip list (if, end_if, raise,
  jump, exception_new, exception_stack_*, tuple_new, const_str)
- Fixes multi-assignment (x, y, z = 1, 2, 3) which uses tuple iteration

Verified: multi-assign, swap, nested loops, list methods, conditionals
all produce correct output matching CPython.

Make Scan Receipt button more prominent on home dashboard

AddRoomModal with gap-3 so both buttons stand out independently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Agentic storefront generation: one-click AI-built stores

Replace manual 3-step storefront wizard with Gamma/Lovable-style
one-click generation. User picks a template style, AI builds the
entire store from brand data (identity, products, colors, logo).

Server:
- Add POST /api/v1/storefronts/generate endpoint
- 3 template strategies: Bold & Direct, Story-Driven, Conversion Machine
- Each generates template-specific copy referencing actual products
- Product-aware testimonials with real product names
- Brand-specific FAQs with product category awareness
- Auto-publishes on creation (no manual publish step)

Client:
- Rewrite CreateStorefrontFlow as agentic template picker
- 3 visual template cards with gradient headers and section previews
- Animated generation progress (5-step build animation)
- Auto-detects brand, zero manual configuration needed
- Builder becomes refinement tool after AI generates everything

Fix VPN test container cleanup, add ProtonVPN credential hint

doesn't deadlock on a full channel when the WebSocket disconnects.

VPN config forms (settings, setup wizard, app detail). Required when 2FA
is enabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace DOMContentLoaded with immediate async IIFE for cloud restore

DOMContentLoaded fires before the inline script runs (script is at
the bottom of <body>), so the cloud data was never loaded on page
startup. Replaced with an immediately-invoked async function.

commit.message:
fix(patterns,todo): address issues #360, #361, #362 — skill improvements (#364)

- #360: Add `language` field to TodoMetadata and `--language` CLI flag
  to `csa todo create`, enabling language-aware TODO plan creation.
  Update mktd PATTERN.md to pass detected language during save phase.

- #361: Enrich mktd PATTERN.md DRAFT phase to require Design Overview
  section (problem statement, key decisions, constraints), per-task
  context sub-bullets with >= 20 word descriptions, and Debate Findings
  section for post-compaction context recovery.

- #362: Update mktsk SKILL.md and PATTERN.md to use TaskCreate/TaskUpdate
  for progress tracking instead of modifying TODO.md checkboxes. TODO.md
  is now a read-only planning artifact.

Also: split review_cmd.rs monolith (834→765 lines) by extracting
output sanitization to review_cmd_output.rs.

Closes #360, closes #361, closes #362

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add 'vulnscope fix' auto-remediation command (#14)

Add remediate.py with:
- Remediation dataclass with package, ecosystem, versions, command, reboot flag, risk level
- Update strategies for deb, snap, flatpak, pypi, npm, cargo, brew ecosystems
- Reboot detection for kernel/systemd/libc packages
- Risk classification (safe/caution/dangerous)

CLI commands:
- vulnscope fix --dry-run (default) — show fixable vulns
- vulnscope fix --apply — execute update commands
- vulnscope fix --apply --skip-reboot — skip reboot-requiring updates
- vulnscope fix --apply --ecosystem deb — filter by ecosystem

Includes 26 tests covering all logic paths with mocked subprocess calls.

Co-authored-by: michael <michael@BettyWhite-2.0>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Remove unused files and ignore build artifacts

Remove: .DS_Store, .scratchpad.md, image.png, images/, lilbud.uf2
Ignore: .DS_Store, /lilbud.uf2 (root-level UF2 build artifact)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: tiered domain blocking, enhanced DLP patterns, and dashboard doctor hint

Add Tier A hard-block for exfiltration-only domains (webhook.site,
requestbin.com, hookbin.com, interact.sh, burpcollaborator.net) and
Tier B risk-bump for dual-use infrastructure (ngrok.io, pipedream.net)
with boundary-safe subdomain matching.

Domain normalization uses the URL API for punycode parity between config
entries (normalizeDomainEntry) and runtime URL hosts (normalizeHost).
Config-store validates domain fields, rejecting URLs and whitespace.

Enhance outbound DLP with GitHub OAuth (gho_), GitLab PAT (glpat-),
and Stripe live key (sk_live_) patterns.

Add static openclaw doctor hint to Dashboard component health strip and
complementary-tools section to README linking openclaw-security-monitor.

142 tests pass (10 new: domain utilities, Tier A/B enforcement, DLP
token detection, config-store domain validation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
